Gratitude

The Ones Who Shaped Us

Behind every great student is an even greater teacher.

A
✦ Principal
Mr. Anil Kumar Gupta
Principal

"Education is not the filling of a pail, but the lighting of a fire. Every Shakuntalite carries that flame."

D
Mrs. Deepali Sharma
Mathematics

"Every equation has a solution — just like every student has infinite potential."

N
Ms. Narendra Kumar
Mathematics

"Numbers never lie — and neither does hard work."

P
Mr. Pyare Lal Sharma
Physics

"The universe is made of stories, not atoms. Go write yours."

R
Mrs. Ruchi Shukla
Chemistry

"Every reaction has a cause. Make your life's reaction a beautiful one."

S
Mrs. Sulagana Mukherjee
English

"You are the author of your own life. Make it a masterpiece."

P
Mrs. Pratibha
English

"Words have the power to change the world — use them wisely."

A
Mrs. Archana Sharma
Hindi

"हिंदी केवल भाषा नहीं, हमारी आत्मा है।"

S
Mrs. Shushila Sharma
Hindi

"भाषा में वो शक्ति है जो दिलों को जोड़ती है।"

S
Ms. Savitri Sharma
Sanskrit

"विद्या ददाति विनयम् — Knowledge brings humility."

M
Mrs. Manju Kala
History

"Those who know history are destined to shape it."

V
Mr. Vijay Kumar Sharma
Geography

"The world is your classroom — explore every corner of it."

R
Ms. Rekha Jain
Music

"Music speaks what words cannot. Let your melody resonate forever."

P
Dr. Prahlad Kumar Sharma
Physical Education

"A healthy body houses a brilliant mind. Champions are made in practice."

S
Ms. Seema Parashar
Home Science

"The greatest lessons in life are learned at home — and in this classroom."

Our Journey

Years That Built Us

2019

The Beginning

Nervous first steps through those iron gates. Blank notebooks, wide eyes, and a school that would become our second home.

2020

The Year We Adapted

The world paused but we didn't. Online classes, virtual farewells, and lessons learned beyond textbooks.

2022

Back to the Corridors

The joy of returning — the smell of chalk, the sound of bells, and the chaos of the canteen we had missed so dearly.

2024

Golden Year

Championships, performances, friendships deepened by time. We were no longer students — we were Shakuntalites.

2025

The Bittersweet Goodbye

Caps, gowns, and tears. Not the end of a story — just the end of a beautiful chapter.

Farewell Wall

Words from the Heart

Leave your love, your laughter, your last goodbyes.

You taught me that the real classroom is the world. Thank you for being my compass.

A
Aarav Krishnan
Section A · Batch 2025

These walls heard our secrets, our laughter, and our dreams. I'll carry every echo forever.

S
Sneha Patel
Section B · Batch 2025

To my teachers — you didn't just teach subjects, you built humans. I am your proudest work.

R
Rohan Mehta
Section C · Batch 2025

Leave Your Mark

Write a wish, a memory, or simply your name — so you're always part of this wall.
